summary: ACCEPT. Independent QA reviewed review commit 81aacaea against base 116053b6f837a44f4d4b9892a18c1b50aa95305f and re-ran the material gates. The diff is evidence/status/handoff only, with no apps/packages/tests/content-source/tools/docs product drift. Writer evidence covers pnpm check, pnpm test, sim determinism, sim perf baseline, web build, desktop security/package, Chromium e2e, Web responsiveness, 730-day Node multi-year duration/RSS, and M5 save/load plus client-core session export/import timing. The import/export caveat is acceptable for the current slice because the desktop bridge exposes only runtime/fullscreen; QA recommends PASS for this task, not REQUEST_CHANGES.

tests_run.result: Clean before QA handoff creation; no tracked or untracked changes after validation reruns.

Only project/goal-mode-state.json, project/model-routing-state.json, project/tasks/thread-registry.json, project/tasks/active/M5-PERFORMANCE-GATE-001.json, and M5 performance gate outbox/route messages changed.

decisions: ACCEPT route_to=lead_orchestrator. Do not mark CLOSED in this QA handoff.

Gate recommendation is PASS for M5-PERFORMANCE-GATE-001. PASS_WITH_LIMITS is not required for the current task because the import/export boundary caveat matches the implemented M5 session surface and the desktop bridge intentionally lacks file import/export IPC.
Writer used the repository's real e2e script `pnpm test:e2e`; task JSON still lists stale alias `pnpm e2e`, but the actual required coverage ran and passed.
Review commit 81aacaea adds the writer handoff and process state only. Current branch HEAD bf8da77 only adds QA routing state beyond the specified review commit, also process-only.
No telemetry, analytics, server, multiplayer, arbitrary-code mod, release/commercial, product, platform, save/schema, RNG/time, or architecture scope drift was found.
risks: Future desktop file import/export work must add a separate platform/file-bridge timing once such a surface exists; current M5 evidence only measures client-core session JSON export/import and UI save/load state.
Task required_tests contains stale `pnpm e2e` wording while the actual root script is `pnpm test:e2e`; this is non-blocking for acceptance because the real script passed.

Writer handoff command strings for ad hoc timing probes use abbreviated inline code markers. QA reconstructed and re-ran equivalent probes successfully, so this is not a blocker for this evidence-only gate.
requested_action: Integrate the ACCEPT review for M5-PERFORMANCE-GATE-001, keep the task out of CLOSED until lead integration, and preserve the client-core import/export caveat for future platform import/export work.
